# zabbix_user_group (Data Source)

Fetches a Zabbix user group by ID or name. Exactly one of `id` or `name` must be provided.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up by ID
data "zabbix_user_group" "by_id" {
  id = "7"
}

# Look up by name
data "zabbix_user_group" "by_name" {
  name = "Network administrators"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the user group. One of `id` or `name` must be set.
- `name` (String) Display name of the user group. One of `id` or `name` must be set.

### Read-Only

- `debug_mode` (String) Debug mode for the group: `disabled` or `enabled`.
- `gui_access` (String) Frontend authentication method: `system_default`, `internal`, or `disabled`.
- `users_status` (String) Status of the users in this group: `enabled` or `disabled`.
